# Pull Request Policy

PCB Atlas is closed-source commercial software. This public repository is for feedback, bug reports, documentation feedback, localization feedback, and issue triage.

Please do not submit product source-code patches, binary changes, reverse-engineered implementation details, private board files, or unofficial app distributions.

If you want to contribute, open an issue instead:

- Bug report for crashes, import failures, rendering issues, or unexpected behavior.
- Format support request for PCB format variants or vendor output.
- Documentation issue for unclear or outdated guidance.
- Localization feedback for wording, terminology, or untranslated text.
- Feature request for workflow-level product needs.
